arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names 'under the radar' Liverpool player who Arsenal wish they had
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher insists the contributions of Cody Gakpo have gone unnoticed for Liverpool this term as he continues to chip in with valuable goals whilst title rivals Arsenal struggle for goals

arts.ttl: Arsenal rival Manchester City for transfer of 23-year-old with 14 G/A this season
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester City are reportedly among the transfer suitors for Villarreal winger Alex Baena, who could also be a target for Saudi Pro League clubs. arts.ttl: Arne Slot namedrops Arsenal to make Premier League title race point to Liverpool stars
arts.sum: Victory for Arsenal would see them close the gap on Liverpool to five points going into that follow-up clash at the Etihad Stadium.. Arne Slot has fired a message to Arsenal and Liverpool ahead of another big weekend in the Premier League .

arts.ttl: Arsenal man’s agent at another club’s training centre, ‘fluid conversation’ – ‘Complex process’ with Gunners lies ahead
arts.sum: Arsenal have sent Albert Sambi Lokonga out on loan since January 2023. After spending temporary spells in England with Crystal Palace and Luton Town, Arsenal let the midfielder join Sevilla on loan last summer. The La Liga side have an option to buy at the end of this season. arts.ttl: Arsenal AGREE deal for first summer signing
arts.sum: Hamill has been a regular in St Johnstone’s U18 team so far this season and his imminent arrival at Arsenal follows the departure of Ayden Heaven to Manchester United during the January transfer window. Mikel Arteta’s side will pay a transfer fee in excess of €100,000 to purchase the 15-year-old and he will formally link up with his new team-mates on 1 July.

arts.ttl: “Start playing” | ExWHUEmployee | Hammers defender in talks for exit
arts.sum: West Ham Academy defender Luizao is in talks to depart the club, it has been reported by ExWHUEmployee. The Brazilian defender, who joined the club in 2023 from São Paulo, has struggled in his development towards first team football and it’s understood he is keen to move on and kick-start his career elsewhere. Reporting on... The post “Start playing” | ExWHUEmployee | Hammers defender in talks for exit appeared first on The West Ham Way.

arts.ttl: West Ham and Leicester City want to sign same player – Have made ‘unofficial offers’
arts.sum: West Ham United and Leicester City are in the picture to sign Club Brugge’s Chemsdine Talbi in the summer window. That’s at least what Africa Foot are reporting, and they cover the latest on West Ham and Leicester’s efforts to try and sign the 19-year-old. arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher sets Liverpool title challenge and explains why they've got edge on Arsenal
arts.sum: Liverpool head to Manchester City this weekend with the Premier League title race hotting up - but Jamie Carragher believes a win will all but end Arsenal's hopes

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed huge Joan Garcia transfer boost as Espanyol chief makes admission over release clause
arts.sum: Arsenal are handed a boost in their efforts to sign Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia, who could be allowed to leave the Spanish club for less than his release clause.

arts.ttl: Champions League draw LIVE: Arsenal, Liverpool and Aston Villa learn last-16 opponents and route to the final
arts.sum: The three Premier League sides will learn who they face in the round of 16, as well as their potential opponents in the quarter-finals and semi-finals
